title: Remove submission link from WorkForm UI
excerpt: Hello, I am creating a Monday WorkForm from a board and it won’t allow me to hide a question in the form for “submission link”. How do I delete this from the intake form? It should only populate the link when a submissio…

posts.author: kelseyotley (Kelsey Otley)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am creating a Monday WorkForm from a board and it won’t allow me to hide a question in the form for “submission link”. How do I delete this from the intake form? It should only populate the link when a submission is sent in, not ask for one in the form.

posts.author: Kevin28Devoe (Kevin28Devoe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I also have this same question and I cannot find any proper answers on the internet and also need a solution.

Best Regards,
Kevin
txtag

posts.author: kelseyotley (Kelsey Otley)
posts.cookedHtml:
no you can’t view it in the backend of form to be able to hide it but it then appears in the live form

posts.cookedHtml: I’d recommend reaching out to support then. Possibly a bug?
